title: lithocarpus orbicularis
intro: Lithocarpus orbicularis, also known as the Bur Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus orbicularis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Lithocarpus orbicularis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
